title: chore(deps): update typescript-eslint monorepo to v1.11.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint) | devDependencies | minor | [`1.10.2` -> `1.11.0`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/@typescript-eslint%2feslint-plugin/1.10.2/1.11.0) |
| [@typescript-eslint/parser](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint) | devDependencies | minor | [`1.10.2` -> `1.11.0`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/@typescript-eslint%2fparser/1.10.2/1.11.0) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint</summary>

### [`v1.11.0`](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1110httpsgithubcomtypescript-eslinttypescript-eslintcomparev1102v1110-2019-06-23)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/compare/v1.10.2...v1.11.0)

##### Bug Fixes

-   **eslint-plugin:** [no-magic-numbers] add support for enums ([#​543](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/543)) ([5c40d01](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/5c40d01))
-   **eslint-plugin:** [promise-function-async] allow any as return value ([#​553](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/553)) ([9a387b0](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/9a387b0))
-   **eslint-plugin:** Remove duplicated code ([#​611](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/611)) ([c4df4ff](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/c4df4ff))
-   **parser:** add simpleTraverse, replaces private ESLint util ([#​628](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/628)) ([aa206c4](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/aa206c4))
-   **typescript-estree:** fix more cases with double slash in JSX text ([#​607](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/607)) ([34cfa53](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/34cfa53))

##### Features

-   **eslint-plugin:** [no-explicit-any] ignoreRestArgs ([#​548](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/548)) ([753ad75](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/753ad75))
-   **eslint-plugin:** add `consistent-type-definitions` rule ([#​463](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/463)) ([ec87d06](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/ec87d06))
-   **eslint-plugin:** add new rule no-empty-function ([#​626](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/626)) ([747bfcb](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/747bfcb))
-   **eslint-plugin:** add new rule no-floating-promises ([#​495](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/495)) ([61e6385](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/61e6385))

#### [1.10.2](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/compare/v1.10.1...v1.10.2) (2019-06-10)

##### Bug Fixes

-   **eslint-plugin:** peerDep should specify semver major range ([#​602](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/issues/602)) ([5589938](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/commit/5589938))

#### [1.10.1](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/compare/v1.10.0...v1.10.1) (2019-06-09)

**Note:** Version bump only for package [@​typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint](https://togithub.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint)

</details>
